servinfosub.title: DTC Detecting Condition and Trouble Area

attention3.ptxt: For type distinction of OBD system, refer to “Discrimination for OBD System” under OBD System Description .

entry.ptxt: DTC detecting condition
Trouble area

ptxt.emph: P0351: Ignition Coil “A” Primary / Secondary Circuit

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.1 and/or its circuit is open with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

item.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly and/or its circuit

ptxt.emph: P0352: Ignition Coil “B” Primary / Secondary Circuit

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.2 and/or its circuit is open with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P0353: Ignition Coil “C” Primary / Secondary Circuit

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.3 and/or its circuit is open with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P0354: Ignition Coil “D” Primary / Secondary Circuit

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.4 and/or its circuit is open with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P2300: Ignition Coil “A” Primary Control Circuit Low

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.1 drive circuit is shorted to ground with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P2301: Ignition Coil “A” Primary Control Circuit High

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.1 drive circuit is shorted to power supply with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P2303: Ignition Coil “B” Primary Control Circuit Low

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.2 drive circuit is shorted to ground with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P2304: Ignition Coil “B” Primary Control Circuit High

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.2 drive circuit is shorted to power supply with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P2306: Ignition Coil “C” Primary Control Circuit Low

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.3 drive circuit is shorted to ground with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P2307: Ignition Coil “C” Primary Control Circuit High

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.3 drive circuit is shorted to power supply with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P2309: Ignition Coil “D” Primary Control Circuit Low

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.4 drive circuit is shorted to ground with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)

ptxt.emph: P2310: Ignition Coil “D” Primary Control Circuit High

entry.ptxt: Ignition coil assembly No.4 drive circuit is shorted to power supply with engine running.
(Type A and C: 3 D/C detection logic)
(Type B: 2 D/C detection logic)
ECM connector (View: [a])
Ignition coil assembly No.2 ground circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.4 ground circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.1 power supply circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.3 power supply circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.1
Ignition coil assembly No.1 drive circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.3 drive circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.2
Ignition coil assembly No.1 ground circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.3 ground circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.3
Ignition coil assembly No.2 power supply circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.4 power supply circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.4
Ignition coil assembly No.2 drive circuit
Ignition coil assembly No.4 drive circuit
ECM

attention3.ptxt: Confirm that the following condition is met in this “DTC Confirmation Procedure”.

s1.ptxt: Run engine at idle for 1 min.

testgroup.question: Was “Engine and Emission Control System Check” performed?

action.ptxt: Go to Engine and Emission Control System Check .

testgroup.title: Ignition coil assembly power supply circuit check

test1.ptxt: With ignition OFF, disconnect connector from ignition coil assembly related to DTC.
Check for proper terminal connection to ignition coil assembly connector.
If connections are OK, set ignition ON.
Check that voltage between “A1” and “A3”, “B1” and “B3”, “C1” and “C3” or “D1” and “D3” is battery voltage.

testgroup.question: Is check result OK?

testgroup.title: Ignition coil assembly ground circuit check

test1.ptxt: Check that voltage between “A1”, “B1”, “C1” or “D1” and ground is battery voltage.

testgroup.question: Is check result OK?

testgroup.title: Ignition coil assembly drive circuit check

test1.ptxt: With ignition OFF, disconnect “C01” and “E01” connectors from ECM.
Check for proper terminal connections to “C01” and “E01” connectors.
If connections are OK, check the following points.

item.ptxt: Resistance of “A2”, “B2”, “C2” or “D2” circuit: less than 1Ω
Resistance between each of “A2”, “B2”, “C2” or “D2” circuit and ground: infinity
Resistance between “A2” circuit terminal and other terminal at ignition coil connector: infinity
Resistance between “B2” circuit terminal and other terminal at ignition coil connector: infinity
Resistance between “C2” circuit terminal and other terminal at ignition coil connector: infinity
Resistance between “D2” circuit terminal and other terminal at ignition coil connector: infinity
Voltage of “A2”, “B2”, “C2” or “D2” circuit: approx. 0 V (When ignition is ON)

testgroup.question: Is check result OK?

action.ptxt: Repair or replace defective wire harness.

test1.ptxt: Replace ignition coil assembly related to DTC with normal ignition coil assembly.
Perform “DTC Confirmation Procedure” and recheck DTC.
